nasb.text: The sons of Israel went through the midst of the sea on the dry land, and the waters were like a wall to them on their right hand and on their left.

esv.text: And the people of Israel went into the midst of the sea on dry ground, the waters being a wall to them on their right hand and on their left.

cnv.text: 以色列人下到海中走乾地，水在他們的左右作了牆垣。

ccb.text: 以色列人踏着干地走入海中，海水如两道墙立在他们左右。
